summary: The diff implements most of the requested requirements including stable variable CRUD backends, frontend form components wiring to React Query hooks, Layout navigation preservation, and a migration.mo file. However, REQ-4's specific requirement for storing delivery days of the week (as an array of day names or indices per subscriber) appears to use date-based day records rather than the requested delivery-days-of-week field. REQ-11's migration.mo does not implement the specific legacy boolean `delivered` field migration to tri-state status variant — it instead migrates inventoryAdjustments from List to Array. The backend/main.mo is truncated so stable variable declarations cannot be fully verified.

missing_requirements.requirement: Subscriptions should store delivery days of the week per subscriber (as an array of day names or indices)
missing_requirements.reason: The SubscriptionAdvanced type in both migration.mo and main.mo uses dayRecords: [DayRecord] (date-specific records) rather than a deliveryDaysOfWeek field storing an array of day names or indices. The SubscriptionInputAdvanced type visible in main.mo does not include a deliveryDays field.

missing_requirements.requirement: Generate a migration.mo that migrates legacy boolean delivered fields to the tri-state status variant (#delivered, #missed, #pending)
missing_requirements.reason: The migration.mo file migrates inventoryAdjustments from List to Array but does not contain any logic to convert legacy boolean delivered fields on subscription day records to the tri-state status variant. The DayRecord type already uses the tri-state status but no legacy boolean conversion logic is present.

hallucinated_features.description: InventoryAdjustmentHistory placeholder component informing users the feature is unavailable
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention adding a placeholder InventoryAdjustmentHistory component or removing inventory adjustment history functionality. This component was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: NotificationPanel with low-stock ingredient alerts and expiring subscription alerts
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention a notification panel, low-stock alerts, or expiring subscription notifications. These features were not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Migration of inventoryAdjustments from List to Array in migration.mo instead of the requested subscription day record boolean field migration
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-11 specifically requests migration of subscription day record legacy boolean delivered fields. The migration.mo instead focuses on converting inventoryAdjustments storage format, which was not requested.
